article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.3.2. 14789 Burnaby Housing Agreement (5980 Kathleen Avenue) Bylaw 2026 (FA).pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on: Bosa Properties housing agreement for 94 non-market rental units in Metrotown
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a bylaw that would authorize a formal housing agreement with Bosa Properties for 94 below-market rental units at 5980 Kathleen Avenue — locking in rent rules and tenant protections for displaced renters and low-income households in perpetuity.
briefs.action_required: If you were displaced from 5977–5979 Wilson Ave or 6035 Wilson Ave, contact the City of Burnaby about your right to a replacement unit.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Housing Agreement (5980 Kathleen Ave) Bylaw 2026 — Council adoption vote
